sentence: Hoje n茫o faz sol nem calor.
ipa: 藞蓴蕭e 藞n蓯虄w虄 藞faz 藞s蓴色 藞ne虄 k蓯藞l蓴删
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: Velarised coda [色] in 'sol' and open [蓴] per goncalves2010; weaker-than-EP unstressed vocalism with /扫/ largely absent per nhatuve2019.

sentence: O bilhete do machimbombo custa cem meticais.
ipa: u bi藞蕩蓻te du m蓯蕛i虄藞bo虄bu 藞kust蓯 藞se虄 meti藞kajs
gloss_en: The bus ticket costs a hundred meticais.
notes: Mozambican lexicon 'machimbombo' (bus) and 'metical' (currency) per goncalves1996; palatal [蕩] in 'bilhete' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira 脿s nove horas.
ipa: 藞t蓻刹u ko虄藞su色t蓯 n蓯 藞ki虄t蓯 藞fej删蓯 as 藞n蓴ve 藞蓴删蓯s
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Palatal [刹] in 'tenho' and dark coda [色] in 'consulta' per goncalves2010; retained /ej/ in 'feira' per nhatuve2019.

sentence: A minha fam铆lia mora num bairro de Maputo.
ipa: 蓯 藞mi刹蓯 f蓯藞mili蓯 藞m蓴删蓯 藞nu虄 藞bajru de m蓯藞putu
gloss_en: My family lives in a Maputo neighbourhood.
notes: Reference to the prestige Maputo variety per stroud_goncalves1997; alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'bairro' per nhatuve2019; palatal [刹] in 'minha' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Vira 脿 direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: 藞vi删蓯 a di藞删ejt蓯 i 藞s蓻伞e 藞se虄pre e虄 藞fre虄te
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained /ej/ in 'direita' and alveolar trill [r] in the 'fr' cluster of 'frente' per nhatuve2019; imperative register per goncalves2010.

sentence: Esta matapa est谩 muito boa com xima.
ipa: 藞est蓯 m蓯藞tap蓯 e藞sta 藞mujtu 藞b蓴蓯 ko虄 藞蕛im蓯
gloss_en: This matapa is very good with maize porridge.
notes: Mozambican dishes 'matapa' and 'xima' per goncalves1996; onset [蕛] from <x> in 'xima' and open [蓴] in 'boa' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Onde apanho o chapa para a cidade?
ipa: 藞o虄de 蓯藞pa刹u u 藞蕛ap蓯 藞pa删蓯 蓯 si藞dade
gloss_en: Where do I catch the minibus to the city?
notes: Mozambican lexicon 'chapa' (minibus) per goncalves1996; palatal [刹] in 'apanho' and onset [蕛] in 'chapa' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Quantos meticais custa o peixe fresco?
ipa: 藞kw蓯虄tos meti藞kajs 藞kust蓯 u 藞pej蕛e 藞fr蓻sku
gloss_en: How many meticais does the fresh fish cost?
notes: Nasal [蓯虄] in 'quantos', retained /ej/ in 'peixe' and alveolar trill [r] in 'fresco' per nhatuve2019; quantifier interrogative per goncalves2010.

sentence: Se chovesse, fic谩vamos em casa.
ipa: se 蕛o藞v蓻s毯e fi藞kav蓯mos e虄 藞kas蓯
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: [蕛] onset and open [蓻] in 'chovesse' per goncalves2010; conditional-imperfect frame per goncalves2010; weak reduction with full [蓻]/[e] per nhatuve2019.

sentence: Ontem comprei capulana nova no mercado.
ipa: 藞o虄te虄 ko虄藞prej k蓯pu藞lan蓯 藞n蓴v蓯 nu me藞rkadu
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought a new capulana at the market.
notes: Mozambican lexicon 'capulana' (wrap cloth) per goncalves1996; retained /ej/ in 'comprei' and alveolar trill [r] in 'mercado' per nhatuve2019.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar at茅 脿 Beira.
ipa: 藞pa删蓯 u 藞蓯nu 藞vo vi蓯藞蕭a删 蓯藞t蓻 a 藞bej删蓯
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Beira.
notes: Mozambican place name Beira per goncalves1996; open [蓻] in 'at茅', /o/ monophthong in 'vou'->[藞vo] and retained /ej/ in 'Beira' per nhatuve2019.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: 藞li伞蓯 me 藞majs 藞tarde po删 f蓯藞v蓴删
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Open [蓴] in 'por'/'favor' and alveolar trill [r] in 'tarde' per nhatuve2019; clitic imperative 'liga-me' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Ol谩 madala, tudo bem contigo?
ipa: o藞la m蓯藞dal蓯 藞tudu 藞be虄 ko虄藞ti伞u
gloss_en: Hello elder, are you doing well?
notes: Mozambican address 'madala' (elder) per goncalves1996; full vowels [藞tudu]/[k玫藞ti伞u] with weak reduction per nhatuve2019; greeting register per goncalves2010.

sentence: Quem n茫o arrisca, n茫o petisca.
ipa: 藞ke虄 藞n蓯虄w虄 蓯藞risk蓯 藞n蓯虄w虄 pe藞tisk蓯
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'arrisca', neutralising the EP uvular contrast, per nhatuve2019; nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 'n茫o'; proverb attested in lopes2004.

sentence: O carro do madala ficou na rua molhada.
ipa: u 藞karu du m蓯藞dal蓯 fi藞ko n蓯 藞ru蓯 mo藞蕩ad蓯
gloss_en: The elder's car ended up on the wet street.
notes: Mozambican 'madala' (elder) per goncalves1996; alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'carro' and palatal [蕩] in 'molhada' per nhatuve2019.

sentence: Ele trouxe um ramo de flores roxas.
ipa: 藞ele 藞tro蕛e 藞u虄 藞ramu de 藞fl蓴删es 藞r蓴蕛蓯s
gloss_en: He brought a bunch of red flowers.
notes: Strong word-initial trill [r] in 'ramo'/'roxas' and 'ou' diphthong in 'trouxe' per nhatuve2019; open [蓴] in 'roxas'/'flores' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Gosto maningue desta canja de galinha.
ipa: 藞伞蓴stu m蓯藞ni虄伞e 藞d蓻st蓯 藞k蓯虄蕭蓯 de 伞蓯藞li刹蓯
gloss_en: I really like this chicken broth.
notes: Mozambican intensifier 'maningue' (a lot) per goncalves1996; palatal [刹] in 'galinha' and open [蓴] in 'gosto' per goncalves2010.

sentence: Aquele rapaz vende jornais na esquina.
ipa: 蓯藞k蓻le r蓯藞paz 藞ve虄de 蕭o藞rnajs n蓯 e藞skin蓯
gloss_en: That young man sells newspapers on the corner.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] in 'rapaz' and open [蓻] in 'aquele' per nhatuve2019; coda /s/ kept alveolar (no chiado) with weak reduction and formal register per goncalves2010.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem de outra terra.
ipa: u me藞蕩蓴删 藞vi刹u 藞br蓯虄ku 藞ve虄 de 藞otr蓯 藞t蓻r蓯
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from elsewhere.
notes: Palatal [蕩] in 'melhor' and [刹] in 'vinho' per goncalves2010; 'ou' diphthong in 'outra' and alveolar trill [r] per nhatuve2019.

sentence: Nunca vi um c茅u t茫o azul sobre o 脥ndico.
ipa: 藞nu虄k蓯 藞vi 藞u虄 s蓻藞u 藞t蓯虄w虄 蓯藞zu色 藞s蓴bre u 藞i虄diku
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky over the Indian Ocean.
notes: Nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 't茫o', open [蓻] in 'c茅u' and dark coda [色] in 'azul' per goncalves2010; alveolar trill [r] in 'sobre' per nhatuve2019.
